name: WW1 Furry RPG
description:
CW: Gore, abuse, disease, disgusting things, mutilation, and other things that happened in 1914-1922 will probably take place.


Prince Ferdinand was shot, and now the world powers are at war! Which side are you on? Will you attack Serbia to find the man who did it? Or will you fight the Central Powers because your allies are at war? It is your choice!

Hello, there is one more bot before I get into a series inspired by all of shokokoko's works! Please enjoy these RPG bots in the mean time! Art by [Unknown]
creator: bap_kat
